title: components & compliance
notes: First interaction components — disclosure block and stat tiles with definition flyouts, both zero JavaScript on native elements. Draft Impressum and Datenschutz pages (awaiting a final address). Internal lab page for component review.

title: three voices
notes: Typography decided from the specimen: Newsreader for display, the system sans for body, Geist Mono for data — self-hosted, OFL. The specimen page is retired; its verdict lives in ADR-003.

title: type & rhythm
notes: Type specimen with candidate faces for the three voices, changelog page, header and footer, CI quality gates. The site can now fail its own build for being slow.

title: foundation
notes: Astro scaffold, design tokens, GitHub Pages pipeline, ADRs 001–002, runbook, holding page. Deployed noindex — it launches when it meets its definition of done, not a date.
